scripts.test:ws1: vitest run tests/unit/math tests/unit/core tests/unit/tools tests/integration/engine-loop.test.ts
scripts.preflight:v4-production-readiness: pnpm build:external-demos && pnpm verify:static-demo-server-smoke && pnpm audit:v4-production-readiness
scripts.verify:v3-examples: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/example-screenshot-audit.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/example-truth-audit/index.ts
scripts.verify:v3-rendering: G3D_WEBGPU_PARITY_REPORT=tests/reports/v3-webgpu-parity.json pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/rendering-v3-labs.spec.ts tests/browser/rendering-debug-timing.spec.ts tests/browser/rendering-large-scene.spec.ts tests/browser/webgpu-error-diagnostics.spec.ts tests/browser/webgpu-real-device.spec.ts tests/browser/webgpu-parity.spec.ts && pnpm verify:v3-browser-matrix && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v3-rendering/index.ts
scripts.verify:v3-assets: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/asset-v3-corpus/index.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config tests/assets/vitest.config.ts tests/assets/gltf-inspection.test.ts tests/assets/gltf-animation-corpus.test.ts tests/assets/v3-asset-corpus.test.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/asset-viewer-browser.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/asset-material-fidelity.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/asset-compression-browser.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v3-assets/index.ts
scripts.verify:v3-editor: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/editor-app.spec.ts tests/browser/editor-authoring-v3.spec.ts tests/browser/editor-exported-project.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v3-editor/index.ts
scripts.verify:v3-runtime: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/animation-browser.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/animated-character-browser.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/character-animation-viewer.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/runtime-systems.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/runtime-character-controller.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v3-runtime/index.ts
scripts.verify:v3-benchmarks: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/compare-engines/index.ts --write-reports && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/engine-comparison.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v3-benchmarks/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-code: pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/tools/v4-validation.test.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-code/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-rendering: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/webgpu-real-device.spec.ts && G3D_WEBGPU_PARITY_REPORT=tests/reports/v4-webgpu-parity.json pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/rendering-v4-visuals.spec.ts tests/browser/webgpu-parity.spec.ts tests/browser/hdr-render-target-v4.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-rendering/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-assets: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/asset-v4-corpus/index.ts && pnpm exec vitest run --config tests/assets/vitest.config.ts tests/assets/v4-asset-corpus.test.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/asset-viewer-v4.spec.ts tests/browser/asset-viewer-browser.spec.ts tests/browser/asset-material-fidelity-v4.spec.ts tests/browser/asset-compression-browser.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-assets/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-editor: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/editor-authoring-v4.spec.ts tests/browser/editor-prefab-workflow.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-editor/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-runtime: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/runtime-v4.spec.ts && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-runtime/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-examples: pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/racing-showcase-v4.spec.ts tests/browser/example-screenshot-audit-v4.spec.ts tests/browser/large-world-streaming-v4.spec.ts && pnpm exec playwright test tests/browser/product-demos.spec.ts -g "environment presets visibly" && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-examples/index.ts
scripts.verify:v4-benchmarks: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/compare-engines/index.ts --v4 --write-reports && tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-benchmarks/index.ts
scripts.preflight:v4-external-evidence: pnpm verify:v4-external-engine-baselines && pnpm dry-run:v4-unity-baselines && pnpm dry-run:v4-unreal-baselines && pnpm run:v4-external-host-evidence && pnpm audit:v4-github-external-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-external-evidence-readiness
scripts.preflight:v4-external-evidence:after-exe: pnpm verify:v4-external-engine-baselines && pnpm dry-run:v4-unity-baselines && pnpm dry-run:v4-unreal-baselines && pnpm audit:v4-github-external-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-external-evidence-readiness
scripts.refresh:v4-readiness-reports: pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-claim-gates/index.ts && pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-assets/index.ts && pnpm exec tsx --tsconfig tsconfig.base.json tools/v4-current-capability/index.ts && pnpm audit:v4-hdr-ibl-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-pbr-reference-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-postprocess-suite && pnpm audit:v4-shadow-map-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-hdr-render-target-readiness && pnpm run:v4-external-host-evidence && pnpm audit:v4-unity-unreal-parity && pnpm audit:v4-production-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-pbr-gltf-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-github-external-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-external-evidence-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-ecosystem-readiness && pnpm audit:v4-broad-parity && pnpm audit:v4-completion && pnpm verify:v4-report-freshness
scripts.preflight:v4-parity: pnpm preflight:v4-production-readiness && pnpm preflight:v4-external-evidence && pnpm refresh:v4-readiness-reports && pnpm prepare:v4-external-evidence-handoff && pnpm verify:v4-external-evidence-handoff
scripts.preflight:v4-parity:after-external-evide: pnpm preflight:v4-production-readiness && pnpm preflight:v4-external-evidence:after-execute && pnpm refresh:v4-readiness-reports && pnpm prepare:v4-external-evidence-handoff && pnpm verify:v4-external-evidence-handoff
